name: French Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
Don't be afraid to use almost black bananas (ripeness improves the flavor) and refrigerate the cake for 24 hours before serving for peak taste experience.
Mix water, vinegar, and baking soda. Combine with cake mix and eggs. Stir until moistened.
Scrape the bowl with a spatula. Add mashed bananas. Beat with an electric mixer for 3 minutes at medium speed (300 strokes by hand). Blend in nuts.
Pour into greased and floured 9x13 inches pan. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes (until a toothpick comes out clean).
VARIATION: Two 9-inch layers - baking time 25 minutes
Three 8-inch layers - baking time 30 minutes.
